'''Yarroq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] and gang leader, whose name in his native [[Dosh/Legends|Dosh]] literally meant "Hunts Without Effort."<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>. He kidnapped the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Renci Tosh]] when her [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] crashed on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
